channel.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário

item.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário
item.description:
🚨 Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica
Visão geral:
• 0 com severidade Crítica
• 10 com severidade Alta
• 11 novas CVEs
• 2 novos advisories/exploits

────────────────────────────────────
Infraestrutura - Docker / ESX / Elastic / Grafana / Nginx / VMware / Zabbix

📰 Payload Ransomware Uses Babuk-Inspired Encryption In Attacks On Windows and ESXi - cyberpress.org
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: ESX
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação relata um cenário de ameaça, incidente ou comprometimento relacionado a ESX, no contexto de segurança da informação.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXkFVX3lxTE1UQmZ6dmFnanprY2lzWmYybDRuNlcyUkFsWnBzRjJvbDV0bjB2WDN6NXZZbWs1cTFkV3BpYV9DYTJDNzlhUW9xN1ZJTlFTUzdKYUYxT3hqSHZBcDV6eUE?oc=5
 
────────────────────────────────────
Segurança - Acronis / Axur / Check Point / Harmony SASE / Qualys / SentinelOne

🚨 CISA Flags Actively Exploited Wing FTP Vulnerability Leaking Server Paths
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: 4.3
Resumo:
Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) on Monday added a medium-severity security flaw impacting Wing FTP to its Known Exploited Vulnerabilities (KEV) catalog, citing evidence of active exploitation. The vulnerability, CVE-2025-47813 (CVSS score: 4.3), is an information disclosure vulnerability that leaks the installation path of the application under certain conditions
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/03/cisa-flags-actively-exploited-wing-ftp.html
 
💣 CISA flags Wing FTP Server flaw as actively exploited in attacks
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
government agencies to secure their Wing FTP Server instances against an actively exploited vulnerability that may be chained in remote code execution attacks.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/cisa-flags-wing-ftp-server-flaw-as-actively-exploited-in-attacks/
 
📢 Is Check Point (CHKP) Using Secure AI Advisory To Redefine Its Long-Term Services Narrative? - Yahoo Finance
 
Criticidade: Baixa
Ferramenta: Check Point
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A matéria apresenta um advisory de segurança relacionado a Check Point, com informações úteis para avaliação de risco e eventual atualização.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMigAFBVV95cUxOSi1WS3NBS3FQWk1WN0o1THZGLXM4bGEzZFE5UlNmdUtsTHE3M1Q3cTVqZmFDS2h1Nm5jaWVKT1NpbVN3Z2Z0dzJIM1Q1WUE1N0pSTnEtd3JBMWhmcEVwRlZ1SHNBTWlZcXIxc29KQ011aEk5Q3huOEJtV05HMEI4Vg?oc=5
 
📰 GlassWorm Attack Uses Stolen GitHub Tokens to Force-Push Malware Into Python Repos
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
The GlassWorm malware campaign is being used to fuel an ongoing attack that leverages the stolen GitHub tokens to inject malware into hundreds of Python repositories. "The attack targets Python projects — including Django apps, ML research code, Streamlit dashboards, and PyPI packages — by appending obfuscated code to files like setup.py, main.py, and app.py," StepSecurity said.
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/03/glassworm-attack-uses-stolen-github.html
 
📰 Stryker attack wiped tens of thousands of devices, no malware needed
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Last week's cyberattack on medical technology giant Stryker was limited to its internal Microsoft environment and remotely wiped tens of thousands of employee devices.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/stryker-attack-wiped-tens-of-thousands-of-devices-no-malware-needed/
 
────────────────────────────────────
Sistemas / Cloud - 1Password / Azure / Office / Ubuntu / Windows Server / WordPress

🚨 USN-8098-2: Linux kernel (GCP) vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Qualys discovered that several vulnerabilities existed in the AppArmor Linux kernel Security Module (LSM). An unprivileged local attacker could use these issues to load, replace, and remove arbitrary AppArmor profiles causing denial of service, exposure of sensitive information (kernel memory), local privilege escalation, or possibly escape a container. (LP: #2143853) Several security issues were discovered in the Li...
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8098-2
 
🚨 USN-8099-1: curl vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Zhicheng Chen discovered that curl could incorrectly reuse the wrong connection for Negotiate-authenticated HTTP or HTTPS requests. This could result in the use of credentials from a different connection, contrary to expectations. (CVE-2026-1965) It was discovered that curl incorrectly leaked OAuth2 bearer tokens when following a redirect. This could result in tokens being sent to the wrong host, contrary to expectat...
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8099-1
 
📰 Microsoft to Block Windows 11 and Server 2025 Automated Installation After Critical RCE Vulnerability - CyberSecurityNews
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Windows Server
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A notícia trata de uma falha de execução remota de código relacionada a Windows Server, com potencial impacto importante em ambientes expostos ou mal segmentados.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMihwFBVV95cUxPcUR6TUpTNTVQWDlDVVZGNHlTQjlPd1hGdnlHOVNoNmk3czZESnB3RzNKLVFqUFQ0dlNoUm5rX1NWWkN3RGc3WEg3dUNmbU45cHdFX0RuM3VZV2JSdnl2WEU4Y0taZWJSRVBBeVVkNXh4N0UtbjItVUZQOGNtYjVYRU1qYmJXOTA?oc=5
 
📰 Continental aposta na Microsoft Azure AI: uma grande evolução na gestão de requisitos de R&D - Microsoft Source
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Azure
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A notícia trata de uma falha de execução remota de código relacionada a Azure, com potencial impacto importante em ambientes expostos ou mal segmentados.
Link: https://news.google.?oc=5
 
📰 Attackers Hijacking Legitimate Websites to Attack Microsoft Teams users - CyberSecurityNews
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Office
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação relata um cenário de ameaça, incidente ou comprometimento relacionado a Office, no contexto de segurança da informação.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMie0FVX3lxTE8wQzdvekRBbVlPMFE4a3l0VGZ4ZEZwUk95SHA4R3VsclVGeGYwenlrUWhjeHJpRmQwejdqeTNzRy1YZHBac0VqcUxBc3RpVl9kNjlvaEJLa3hmWF9WYjVyUW1jLWwwN0xfOXlWSFJqd3RyQUZleXBJUlU0dw?oc=5
 
📰 Pakistan Airstrike In Pictures: Rescue Teams Race Through Rubble After Deadly Attack On Kabul Rehab Hospital Kills 400 - Republic World
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Office
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação relata um cenário de ameaça, incidente ou comprometimento relacionado a Office, no contexto de segurança da informação.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMi_?oc=5
 
────────────────────────────────────
Período: Notícias do período de 15/03/2026 até 17/03/2026.
